name: LoopBegin
description: Start accumulator loop, read from feedback buffer

global_accum._role: PERSISTENT feedback accumulator shared by render/loopBegin (reads) and render/loopEnd (writes). Dynamic global surface (scanned from pass inputs; name starts with 'global_'). Created W x H, rgba16f, linear, 4-channel, double-buffered. loopBegin only READS it (the prior loop iteration / prior frame's accumulated state); loopEnd writes the processed chain result back to it. Persists across frames and loop iterations.

feedback._comment: Accumulator-loop bracket start. loopBegin reads the persistent 'global_accum' surface and lighten-blends (component-wise max) it with the current input, mixing by alpha (0..100 -> 0..1) and scaling the accumulator by intensity (0..100 -> 0..1); result alpha = max(inputColor.a, accum.a). Output passes through as outputTex. The DSL sub-chain between loopBegin and loopEnd is EXPANDED by the frontend compiler and ITERATED N times by the runtime (control-flow loop; reference 10). This shader is NOT the loop body and has NO iteration-index uniform. No MRT (single fragColor). global_accum is double-buffered; loopBegin reads its prior 'global_' contents. The write side of the feedback lives in render/loopEnd (program 'copy' -> global_accum).
